mental_emotional.text: Talkative. Constant desire to do something great, to undertake vast feats of strength. Cerebral activity. Frightful persecutory hallucinations; sees and feels bugs and worms. Moral sense blunted. Personal appearance neglected. Thinks he hears unpleasant remarks about himself. Hallucinations of hearing. Irrational jealousy. Insomnia

head.text: Throbbing and bursting sensation. Pupils dilated. Hearing greatly increased. Roaring and noises in head

eyes.text: Glaucoma, increased tension, decreased corneal sensibility. Eyes staring, expressionless

mouth_throat.text: Dry, burning, tickling, constricted, paralysis of muscles of deglutition. Speech difficult

stomach_abdomen.text: Loss of appetite for solid food. Likes sweets. Hæmorrhages from bowels, stomach

generalities.text: [Nervous] Chorea; paralysis agitans; alcoholic tremors and senile trembling. Local sensory paralysis. Formication and numbness in hands and forearms

sleep.text: Restless, cannot sleep for hours after retiring

dosing.notes: Lower potencies. As a local application to mucous membranes, 2-4 %

keynotes.text: color="#800000">COCAINUM HYDROCHLORICUM An Alkaloid from Erythroxylon Coca (COCAINA) Besides the great usefulness of Cocaine as a local anæsthetic, it has specific homeopathic uses, though the symptoms are mainly clinical only. Sensation as if small foreign bodies or worms were under the skin.
